title: Correlation break (HYPE,ETH) â€” positioning_unwind_candidate
claim: Correlation break between HYPE and ETH (rho=0.095, break_score=0.379) coincides with a funding extreme; likely a positioning unwind that temporarily decouples the pair.
mechanism: Extreme funding forces holders of the expensive-to-hold leg to unwind, creating one-sided flow that decouples the pair.  Correlation recovers once the imbalance is resolved.
